blended.narrative: Crested Butte is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: flurries, highs of 44°F, gusts to 41 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 42".
